signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in to your ShopOS account.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Create a ShopOS account to manage your shop.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send reset instructions if the account exists.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, reset instructions have been sent. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Enter the verification code sent to your email.

verifyTwoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
verifyTwoFactor.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

acceptInvitation.title: You've been invited
acceptInvitation.description: Accept this invitation to join the organization.
acceptInvitation.signInToAccept: Sign in to accept this invitation.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailUnverified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

memberships.title: Members
memberships.description: Manage organization memberships, roles, and location access.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to manage memberships.
errors.lastOwner: The organization must retain at least one active owner.
errors.escalation: You cannot assign a role that exceeds your own permissions.

command.title: Command palette
command.description: Search for pages and actions. Use arrow keys to navigate.

marketing.headline: Built around the work. Ready for every kind of shop.
marketing.description: Open shop operations, built around the work.
